segments.text: Help, Lord, for the godly man ceases! For the faithful disappear from among the sons of men.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: They speak idly everyone with his neighbor;
With flattering lips and a double heart they speak.
segments.speaker: Wicked People

segments.text: May the Lord cut off all flattering lips, And the tongue that speaks proud things,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: With our tongue we will prevail; Our lips are our own; Who is lord over us?
segments.speaker: Wicked People

segments.text: For the oppression of the poor, for the sighing of the needy, Now I will arise; I will set him in the safety for which he yearns.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The words of the Lord are pure words,
Like silver tried in a furnace of earth, Purified seven times.
You shall keep them, O Lord, You shall preserve them from this generation forever.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The wicked prowl on every side, When vileness is exalted among the sons of men.
